title: 1 Pack Gift Boxes, 24 x 15 x 7.6 cm Gift Boxes for Presents with Lids Magnetic Closure Rectangle Collapsible for Groomsman Proposal Box, Wedding, Christmas, Halloween, Birthday Gift (Purple)
features: ★【Gift Box】Gift boxes with lids enhances your gift and makes it stand out. Saves you the need to hunt for wrapping paper, ribbon or tape to wrap your gift.

★【SIZE】Gift boxes for presents measures 24x15x7.6cm / 9.5x6x3 inches, Collapsible gift box can hold chocolates, candies, cosmetics, perfumes, Jewelry, Candles, Cups, souvenirs or smaller clothing accessories and more.
★【STRONG MAGNETIC CLOSURE】The rectangular gift box has a concealed and sturdy magnetic closure that allows the flip-top gift box to be easily opened and closed repeatedly.

★【EASY ASSEMBLY】The repeatable large gift box has a foldable design for easy storage and transportation, tear off the white triangle sticker to easily assemble and glue the box, it is also suitable for everyday or seasonal decorative storage and organization.
★【SPECIAL GIFTS】Delicate magnetic gift box ensure your gift will be unique on Christmas, Easter, Thanksgiving, Mothers Day, Fathers Day, Birthdays, Weddings, Anniversaries, Graduations and more.
description: Product Description About Us eascity Gift Boxes with Lids Eascity is a which concentrates on the production and manufacturing of packaging box more than 10 years.A wonderful life needs a sense of ritual. Replace normal box, our magnetic gift boxes have an improved folding construction that make assembling much easy and time saving. the packaging is flat and easy to store, enough to hold all kinds of presents.Truly elevated your gift Quick and easy gift packaging. Previous page Birthday Gift Box May your birthday be filled with joy and may happiness always be with you. Valentine‘s Day Our gift boxes make your gift more special and bring a touching experience to every gift. Mother’s Day Our boxes add a unique touch to your gifts, making each present feel extra precious. Father’s Day Father’s love protects me silently, and you have always given me unconditional support and love. Christmas’s Day Christmas heralds the arrival of the New Year, and the holidays herald the beginning of life. Next page 1 Birthday Gift 2 Valentine's Day 3 Mother's Day 4 Father's Day 5 Christmas's Day Our Vision Give everyone the ability and opportunity to carefully wrap a unique gift, and you will bring more warmth and joy to your family and friends. Our Responsibility Our goal is to ensure that every gift is packaged with high-quality materials and careful design, so that every gift giver can express their emotions. Our Belief By giving surprises and delights to others, we add beautiful memories and happy experiences to people's lives, making these moments more precious. Our Mission Eascity is committed to creating unique and emotional gift boxes that convey love, joy and romance to everyone who receives them.
